Director's Welcome

A warm welcome from the Director of Library Services

Director of Library Services

Dr. Lilian Isowe

BAEd (UDSM) MA Information Studies (UDSM) PhD (MOI)
"Welcome to the Open University of Tanzania Library - your gateway to knowledge, innovation, and academic excellence."

It is my distinct pleasure to welcome you to the Open University of Tanzania Library website. As the Director of Library Services, I am delighted to present this comprehensive digital platform designed to support your academic journey, research endeavors, and lifelong learning aspirations.

Our library stands as a beacon of knowledge, housing over 800,000 print volumes and providing access to a vast array of electronic resources including journals, books, open courseware, and our growing institutional repository. Whether you are a student, researcher, faculty member, or visitor, our doors are open to serve your information needs.

Through this platform, you can access our KOHA Online Public Access Catalogue, explore our Institutional Repository, utilize electronic resources from world-renowned databases, and benefit from our information literacy training programs. We are committed to providing high-quality information services that support teaching, learning, research, and consultancy.

I invite you to explore the wealth of resources available and encourage you to contact our dedicated library staff for any assistance. Together, let us advance knowledge and transform lives through information access.

librarian@out.ac.tz

Library Portals

Access our specialized digital gateways to knowledge

Library Catalogue (KOHA)

Access our Online Public Access Catalogue to search for books, journals, and resources available in the main library and regional centres.

Access KOHA

Institutional Repository

Explore our digital repository containing theses, dissertations, research papers, and scholarly works produced by OUT community.

Visit Repository

Electronic Resources

Access subscribed and open access electronic journals, books, courseware, and databases from leading publishers worldwide.

Browse Resources

Citation Generator

Generate accurate citations in APA, MLA, Harvard, and Chicago formats for your academic papers and research works.

Generate Citation

Electronic Resources

Comprehensive access to world-class academic databases and open access materials

Open Access Textbooks

BCcampus Open Education

Multidisciplinary

Hosts the B.C. Open Collection containing hundreds of high-quality open textbooks selected for post-secondary curricula.

Access Resource

Directory of Open Access Books (DOAB)

Multidisciplinary

Community-driven discovery service indexing peer-reviewed open access books from trusted publishers worldwide.

Access Resource

JSTOR Open Access Books

Multidisciplinary

Offers more than 12,000 open access books from 130+ publishers including Brill, Cornell, and University of California Press.

Access Resource

OpenStax CNX

Multidisciplinary

Global repository of open textbooks maintained by Rice University. Content is freely available and can be remixed and edited.

Access Resource

OER Commons

Multidisciplinary

Comprehensive infrastructure for curriculum experts to identify high-quality Open Textbooks and collaborate on adaptation.

Access Resource

Open Textbook Library

Multidisciplinary

Comprehensive open textbook database maintained by Open Education Network at University of Minnesota.

Access Resource

Subscribed Textbooks

ARDI Textbooks

Scientific & Technical

Access to major scientific and technical journals and books coordinated by WIPO for developing countries.

Access Resource

EBSCOhost eBooks

Multidisciplinary

Powerful online reference system offering proprietary full-text databases and popular databases from leading providers.

Access Resource

Research4Life Books

Multidisciplinary

Free or low-cost access to academic and professional peer-reviewed books in health, agriculture, environment, and sciences.

Access Resource

Subscribed Electronic Journals

AGORA

Agriculture

Research4Life initiative providing online access to peer-reviewed content in agriculture and biomedical sciences.

Access Resource

ARDI

Innovation & Technology

Access to Research for Development and Innovation coordinated by WIPO for scientific and technical journals.

Access Resource

GOALI

Law & Social Sciences

Global Online Access to Legal Information providing free access to legal research and training resources.

Access Resource

HINARI

Biomedical & Health

Health InterNetwork Access to Research Initiative with publications from 150+ reputable publishers.

Access Resource

OARE

Environmental Science

Online Access to Research in the Environment with over 2,990 peer-reviewed titles from 340+ publishers.

Access Resource

JSTOR

Humanities, Social Sciences & Sciences

Explore millions of high-quality primary sources, artworks, maps, photographs, and scholarly articles.

Access Resource

Emerald Insight

Business, Education, Engineering

Access to journals, books, case studies across accounting, finance, management, marketing, and more.

Access Resource

Royal Society Journal Collection

Multidisciplinary

Archives including works of Fellows, personal papers, letters, manuscripts, and administrative records since 1660.

Access Resource

Open Access Journals

African Journal Archive

Humanities

Digital repository providing access to full-text journal articles published in Africa across sciences, social sciences, and humanities.

Access Resource

BioMed Central

Health Sciences, Medicine, Life Sciences

Portfolio of 300+ peer-reviewed journals sharing discoveries from research communities in STEM and medicine.

Access Resource

DOAJ

Multidisciplinary

Directory of Open Access Journals - unique and extensive index of diverse open access journals from around the world.

Access Resource

Google Scholar

Multidisciplinary

Simple way to broadly search for scholarly literature across articles, theses, books, abstracts, and court opinions.

Access Resource

Nature Publishing Group

Chemistry, Life Sciences, Physical Sciences

Weekly international journal publishing finest peer-reviewed research with open access options.

Access Resource

Public Library of Science (PLOS)

Science & Medicine

Multidisciplinary journal publishing research across all areas of science and medicine with open access.

Access Resource

Springer Open

Science, Technology, Medicine, Humanities

Open access journal articles subject to high-level peer review, author and production services.

Access Resource

British Medical Journal (BMJ)

Medical & Allied Science

Collection of more than 60 medical and allied science titles published by global healthcare knowledge provider.

Access Resource

MIT OpenCourseWare

Multidisciplinary

Free, publicly accessible, openly-licensed digital collection of high-quality teaching and learning materials across wide range of disciplines.

Access Resource

Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health

Public Health

OpenCourseWare project providing free and open access to popular courses in public health.

Access Resource

Open Yale Courses

Multidisciplinary

Free and open access to introductory courses taught by distinguished teachers and scholars at Yale University.

Access Resource

OER Africa

Multidisciplinary

Initiative collaborating with higher education institutions in Africa in development and use of Open Educational Resources.

Access Resource

Carnegie Mellon Open Learning Initiative

Public Health

Online courses and learning materials for instructors and learners at low or no cost in blended or online formats.

Access Resource

OpenLearn (The Open University UK)

Multidisciplinary

Over 1,000 free courses derived from the OU's curriculum and specially commissioned Badged Open Courses.

Access Resource

OASIS

Humanities, Mathematics, Social Sciences, Business

Openly Available Sources Integrated Search - searches open content from 115 different sources with 455,499+ records.

Access Resource

TU Delft OpenCourseWare

Multidisciplinary

High quality digital learning materials on health, energy, sustainability, water, environment, and infrastructures.

Access Resource

PLOS ONE

Science & Medicine

Multidisciplinary journal publishing research across all areas of science and medicine with rigorous peer review.

Access Resource

eLife

Life & Biomedical Sciences

Focuses on life and biomedical sciences with emphasis on open science practices and transparent peer review.

Access Resource

Scientific Reports

Natural & Clinical Sciences

Publishes original research from all areas of the natural and clinical sciences with open access model.

Access Resource

Frontiers in Neuroscience

Neuroscience

Specializes in neuroscience research with open access publishing and collaborative peer review.

Access Resource

Journal of Open Source Software

Open-Source Projects

Focuses on software development and open-source projects with developer-friendly peer review.

Access Resource

F1000Research

Science

Offers immediate publication and transparent peer review across all areas of science and medicine.

Access Resource

Royal Society Open Science

Open Science

Embraces open science ethos with full open access, open data, transparent peer review, and preprinting.

Access Resource

PeerJ

Biological & Medical Sciences

Publishes research in biological and medical sciences with affordable open access model.

Access Resource

Our Services

Comprehensive library services to support your academic and research needs

Reading & Study Facilities

State-of-the-art reading rooms and study spaces equipped with modern furniture and conducive learning environments.

Lending Services

Borrow books within the university compound with flexible loan periods for students and staff.

Inter-Library Loan

Access materials from partner libraries through our extensive inter-library loan network.

Newspapers & Periodicals

Access to current and archived newspapers, magazines, and periodicals for research and general reading.

Photocopying Services

Self-service and assisted photocopying facilities available at affordable rates.

Internet & CD-ROM

High-speed internet access and CD-ROM databases for comprehensive research capabilities.

Information Literacy Training

Training sessions on searching skills, accessing and evaluating information sources effectively.

Audio-Visual Services

Access to audio-visual cassettes, tapes, and multimedia resources for enhanced learning.

User Training

Comprehensive information literacy sessions to enable effective exploitation of available resources.

Citation Generator

Generate accurate academic citations in multiple formats instantly

Generated Citation


                
            

        

    


    
    

        

            
Reference Managers

            
Powerful tools to organize your research and generate bibliographies

        

        

            

                

                    
                

                
Mendeley

                
Free reference manager and academic social network that helps organize research, collaborate with others, and discover latest research.

                
    
                    
  •  Automatic PDF import & metadata extraction
    • 
                    
  •  2GB free cloud storage
    • 
                    
  •  Cite-as-you-write for Word & LibreOffice
    • 
                    
  •  Collaborative research groups
    • 
                    
  •  iOS & Android apps
    • 
                

                
                     Get Mendeley
                
            

            

                

                    
                

                
EndNote

                
Industry-standard reference management software with powerful tools for publishing and managing bibliographies.

                
    
                    
  •  6,000+ citation styles
    • 
                    
  •  Advanced PDF annotation
    • 
                    
  •  Manuscript matcher for journals
    • 
                    
  •  Team access & sharing
    • 
                    
  •  Integration with Web of Science
    • 
                

                
                     Get EndNote
                
            

            

                

                    
                

                
Zotero

                
Free, open-source reference management software to collect, organize, cite, and share research.

                
    
                    
  •  One-click browser capture
    • 
                    
  •  300MB free storage (unlimited with WebDAV)
    • 
                    
  •  Word, LibreOffice & Google Docs plugins
    • 
                    
  •  Collaborative libraries
    • 
                    
  •  Completely free & open source
    • 
                

                
                     Get Zotero
                
            

        

    


   
    

        

            
Special Library Portals

            
Specialized digital collections and portals for focused research

        

        

            

                

                    
                

                

                    
OUT OER Portal

                    
Access the Open University of Tanzania's Open Educational Resources portal, featuring curated open educational materials, course content, and learning resources freely available to the global academic community.

                    
                        Visit OER Portal 
                    
                

            

            

                

                    
                

                

                    
OUT Law Library Portal

                    
Specialized portal for legal research featuring access to legal databases, case law, statutes, and legal journals. Essential resource for law students, legal practitioners, and researchers in Tanzanian and international law.

                    
                        Visit Law Portal 
                    
                

            

            

                

                    
                

                

                    
OUT Library Anti Corruption Research Portal

                    
Dedicated portal for anti-corruption research featuring comprehensive resources on corruption studies, governance frameworks, transparency initiatives, and ethical research methodologies. Essential tool for researchers, policymakers, and students focused on combating corruption in Tanzania and beyond.

                    

                         Active
                         Open Access
                    

                    
                        Access Portal

Advanced Features

            
Cutting-edge tools and technologies that make us the world's best library website

        

        

            

                

                
AI-Powered Search

                
Smart search with natural language processing, auto-suggestions, and semantic understanding to find exactly what you need.

            

            

                

                
Accessibility First

                
WCAG 2.1 AA compliant with screen reader support, keyboard navigation, high contrast mode, and text resizing options.

            

            

                

                
Mobile Optimized

                
Fully responsive design ensuring seamless experience across all devices from smartphones to desktop computers.

            

            

                

                
Real-time Analytics

                
Live dashboard showing user activity, popular resources, and system performance metrics updated in real-time.

            

            

                

                
Secure Access

                
Enterprise-grade security with encrypted connections, secure authentication, and privacy protection for all users.

            

            

                

                
Cloud Integration

                
Seamless integration with cloud storage providers for saving, syncing, and accessing your research anywhere.

            

            

                

                
Research Analytics

                
Personal dashboard tracking your research activity, saved items, citations, and reading history.

            

            

                

                
Virtual Reference

                
24/7 virtual reference service with AI chatbot and live librarian support for immediate assistance.

            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                
 OUT Library

                
The Open University of Tanzania Library is committed to providing world-class information services to support teaching, learning, and research excellence.
